title: 15.36V 46Wh 2985mAh L18C4P90 Laptop Replacement Battery SB10T83120 Compatible with Lenovo ThinkPad L13,L13 Gen2,L13 Yoga,S2 5th Gen,S3 Gen2 Series
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 【Specifications】Battery type: Li-ion; Voltage: 15.36V. Capacity: 46WH/2985mAh. Battery life: More than 500 recharge cycles over the life of the battery. High energy efficiency and extended battery life.

【Compatible Model】Compatible with Lenovo ThinkPad L13 (1st generation), ThinkPad L13 (2nd generation), ThinkPad L13 Yoga (1st generation), ThinkPad L13 Yoga (2nd generation), ThinkPad L13 Yoga 20R5/20R6 series, S2 (5th generation), and S3 Gen2 series.

【Quality Assurance】New from manufacturer, every battery has passed factory testing, grade A cells ensure fast charges and low power consumption, built-in circuit protection ensures both safety and stability.
【Attention】For the new battery, we suggest all of our customers fully charge it by AC power adapter. Maybe it takes a period, the capacity was strain out by inner PCB circuit.
